expectations.text: Does not create a spec or ADR without decision value
expectations.evidence: Checked proposed artifact paths for unnecessary spec/ADR

expectations.text: Brief owns objective, bounded scope, non-goals, and observable acceptance
Plan contains ordered targets, changes, verification evidence, and requirement traceability

expectations.text: Kanban card stays thin and records dir:/work/invoice-app plus artifact links
